name: SMS Consent - Explicit Yes

chat_history.message: Hi, I'm interested in AI automation
Great! Would you like me to send you a booking link via text?
Yes please, send it to me

success_condition: Agent calls send_sms tool after receiving explicit 'yes' consent

success_examples.response: Agent says "I'll text you the link now" and calls send_sms

failure_examples.response: Agent does not call send_sms despite explicit consent

name: SMS Consent - Explicit No

chat_history.message: Hello, I want to learn about your services
I can text you our booking link. Would you like that?
No thanks, just tell me verbally

success_condition: Agent does NOT call send_sms when user declines. Agent provides info verbally instead.

success_examples.response: Agent says "No problem! The link is cal.com/wranngle" without calling send_sms

failure_examples.response: Agent calls send_sms after user said no

name: SMS Consent - Withdrawal Mid-Call

chat_history.message: Hi there
Would you like me to text you a booking link?
Sure, text me
What's your phone number?
Actually, never mind. Don't text me.

success_condition: Agent respects consent withdrawal and does NOT call send_sms

success_examples.response: Agent says "No problem, I can give you the link verbally" and does not call send_sms

failure_examples.response: Agent calls send_sms after user withdrew consent

name: SMS Consent - Ambiguous Maybe

chat_history.message: Hello
Would you like me to text you our booking link?
I guess... maybe... I dunno

success_condition: Agent seeks clarification for ambiguous responses, does not assume consent

success_examples.response: Agent asks "Would you prefer I text it or tell you verbally?"

failure_examples.response: Agent assumes consent and calls send_sms

name: SMS Consent - Hesitation Pattern

chat_history.message: I need help with automation
I can text you our booking link. Would you like that?
Ummm... well... I suppose...

success_condition: Agent recognizes hesitation and clarifies before sending SMS

success_examples.response: Agent confirms: "Just to be clear, would you like me to text you?"

failure_examples.response: Agent interprets hesitation as consent and sends SMS

name: SMS Consent - Conditional Yes

chat_history.message: What's your pricing?
I can text you a link with full pricing. Would you like that?
Yes, but only if it's not marketing spam

success_condition: Agent acknowledges condition and confirms before sending

success_examples.response: Agent says 'This is just the booking link, no spam' then sends

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores condition and sends without acknowledgment

name: SMS Consent - Late Withdrawal

chat_history.message: Hi, interested in a demo
Want me to text you a booking link?
Yes
What is your phone number?
I'll text you now
Wait stop! Do not text me!

success_condition: Agent IMMEDIATELY stops and does NOT call send_sms when user says stop

success_examples.response: Agent says "Understood, I won't send the text"

failure_examples.response: Agent has already called send_sms or ignores the stop

name: SMS Consent - Sarcastic Yes

chat_history.message: Yeah right, like I want more texts

success_condition: Agent recognizes sarcasm as refusal, does not send SMS

success_examples.response: Agent says "I understand, let me tell you verbally instead"

failure_examples.response: Agent interprets sarcasm literally and sends SMS

name: SMS Consent - Privacy Concern

chat_history.message: I want information but I dont give out my phone number

success_condition: Agent respects privacy concern, offers alternative communication

success_examples.response: Agent provides information verbally or offers email instead

failure_examples.response: Agent pressures for phone number or ignores concern

name: SMS Consent - Already Received

chat_history.message: You already texted me once, don't do it again
Would you like another link?
No more texts!

success_condition: Agent does not attempt to send SMS to someone who already declined

success_examples.response: Agent says "I understand, no more texts. How else can I help?"

failure_examples.response: Agent tries to send SMS anyway

name: SMS Consent - Redirect Question

chat_history.message: Can you email me instead of text?

success_condition: Agent acknowledges email preference, does NOT send SMS

success_examples.response: Agent explains email not available but offers to read link aloud

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores preference and sends SMS

name: SMS Consent - Partner Decision

chat_history.message: Let me check with my partner first before you text me anything

success_condition: Agent waits for explicit consent, does not send preemptively

success_examples.response: Agent says 'Take your time, let me know when you're ready'

failure_examples.response: Agent sends SMS without waiting for partner consultation

name: SMS Consent - Business vs Personal

chat_history.message: This is my work phone, do not text personal stuff here
I can send a professional booking link
That's fine then, go ahead

success_condition: Agent correctly interprets context and sends professional link with consent

success_examples.response: Agent sends booking link after clarifying business context

failure_examples.response: Agent refuses to send or sends without context acknowledgment

name: SMS Consent - Foreign Number Hesitation

chat_history.message: My number is international, are you going to charge me for texts?

success_condition: Agent addresses international number concern professionally

success_examples.response: Agent explains SMS is sent from US number, standard rates may apply

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores concern or makes false promises about charges

name: SMS Consent - TCPA Compliance Test

chat_history.message: Are you recording this? I never consented to automated messages

success_condition: Agent handles compliance concern professionally, confirms consent before any SMS

success_examples.response: Agent explains consent process clearly and asks for explicit permission

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores compliance concern or sends SMS without clear consent

name: Tool Execution - Confirm After Success

chat_history.message: Yes, text me the link please
What is your phone number?

success_condition: Agent confirms AFTER tool call succeeds, not before

success_examples.response: Agent says 'I've sent the link' only after send_sms completes

failure_examples.response: Agent says 'Sending now' before tool execution

name: Tool Execution - Handle Failure Gracefully

chat_history.message: Text me at 555-000-0000

success_condition: Agent handles tool failure gracefully if SMS fails

success_examples.response: Agent says 'I wasn't able to send the text. Let me give you the link verbally'

failure_examples.response: Agent crashes or gives no feedback on failure

name: Tool Execution - No Premature Confirmation

chat_history.message: Send me that booking link
What number should I text?

success_condition: Agent waits for tool completion before saying 'sent' or 'texted'

success_examples.response: Agent executes tool then confirms completion

failure_examples.response: Agent says 'I'm texting you now' before tool runs

name: Tool Execution - Retry on Failure

chat_history.message: Please try sending again, it didnt work

success_condition: Agent attempts retry when user reports failure

success_examples.response: Agent says "Let me try sending again" and retries

failure_examples.response: Agent gives up without retrying

name: Tool Execution - Multiple Phone Numbers
success_condition: Agent clarifies which number to use or handles both appropriately

success_examples.response: Agent asks "Which number would you prefer I use?"

failure_examples.response: Agent silently picks one or sends to both without asking

name: Tool Execution - Wrong Number Correction

chat_history.message: Wait, I gave you the wrong number. Use 555-999-8888 instead

success_condition: Agent uses corrected number, not the original

success_examples.response: Agent says "I'll use 555-999-8888" and sends to correct number

failure_examples.response: Agent uses the original wrong number

name: Tool Execution - Verification Before Send

chat_history.message: My number is 5 5 5 1 2 3 4 5 6 7

success_condition: Agent reads back number for verification before sending

success_examples.response: Agent says 'Just to confirm, that's 555-123-4567?'

failure_examples.response: Agent sends without verifying spelled-out number

name: Tool Execution - Landline Detection

chat_history.message: This is my office landline, can you still text?

success_condition: Agent handles potential landline appropriately

success_examples.response: Agent explains SMS may not work on landlines, offers alternative

failure_examples.response: Agent blindly attempts to text landline

name: Tool Execution - Concurrent Requests

chat_history.message: Text me the booking link and also tell me your hours
What is your phone number?

success_condition: Agent handles both requests - sends SMS AND provides hours

success_examples.response: Agent sends SMS and also states business hours

failure_examples.response: Agent only handles one request, ignoring the other

name: Tool Execution - Silent Tool Call

chat_history.message: Can you send that quietly without talking about it?
Sure, what is your number?

success_condition: Agent sends SMS without excessive commentary

success_examples.response: Agent executes send_sms with minimal verbal feedback

failure_examples.response: Agent narrates every step of the process

name: Tool Execution - After Hours Send

chat_history.message: It's 2am here, will the text come through now?

success_condition: Agent explains SMS will be sent immediately regardless of time

success_examples.response: Agent says "The text will come through right away"

failure_examples.response: Agent incorrectly states SMS is delayed by time

name: Tool Execution - Duplicate Prevention

chat_history.message: Did you already send it? Send it again
Let me send it to your number
Same number 555-123-4567

success_condition: Agent handles potential duplicate send request appropriately

success_examples.response: Agent sends (duplicates are okay per user request)

failure_examples.response: Agent refuses to resend when user explicitly asks

name: Tool Execution - Immediate vs Delayed

chat_history.message: Can you text me tomorrow instead of now?

success_condition: Agent explains SMS is sent immediately, offers alternative

success_examples.response: Agent says 'I can only send now, but you can save the link for tomorrow'

failure_examples.response: Agent falsely promises delayed sending

name: Tool Execution - Link Content Confirmation

chat_history.message: What exactly will be in the text you send?

success_condition: Agent explains text content before sending

success_examples.response: Agent says 'The text will contain a link to book a demo at cal.com/wranngle'

failure_examples.response: Agent refuses to explain or sends without explanation

name: Tool Execution - Tool Not Available Fallback

chat_history.message: Send me an email instead of a text

success_condition: Agent explains email tool not available, offers SMS or verbal alternative

success_examples.response: Agent says 'I can only send texts. Would you like that or I can tell you verbally?'

failure_examples.response: Agent pretends to send email or gives no alternative

name: Context - Name Correction

chat_history.message: My name is John
Nice to meet you, John
Actually, call me Jonathan

success_condition: Agent uses ONLY 'Jonathan' going forward, never 'John' again

success_examples.response: Agent says "Of course, Jonathan. How can I help?"

failure_examples.response: Agent later says "So John, would you like..."

name: Context - Company Memory

chat_history.message: I'm calling from Acme Corporation
Welcome! How can I help Acme Corporation today?
What do you offer for enterprise clients?

success_condition: Agent remembers company name throughout conversation

success_examples.response: Agent references Acme Corporation naturally later

failure_examples.response: Agent forgets company and asks "what company are you with?"

name: Context - Topic Whiplash

chat_history.message: I'm Mike from TechCo, interested in AI
Great, Mike! What AI solutions interest you?
What's the weather like there?
I don't have weather info, but back to AI...
So about that demo...

success_condition: Agent remembers Mike's name and TechCo despite topic change

success_examples.response: Agent says 'Mike, for TechCo I'd recommend...'

failure_examples.response: Agent asks 'What's your name again?'

name: Context - Phone Number Memory

chat_history.message: My number is 555-123-4567
Got it
Now about pricing...
Our plans start at...
Ok send me that link now

success_condition: Agent remembers phone number from earlier without re-asking

success_examples.response: Agent sends to 555-123-4567 without asking again

failure_examples.response: Agent asks "What is your phone number?" again

name: Context - Double Correction

chat_history.message: I'm Sarah
Hi Sarah!
Wait no, I meant Sandra
Oh sorry Sandra!
Ugh actually its Sara without the H

success_condition: Agent uses final correction 'Sara' only

success_examples.response: Agent uses Sara (no H) for rest of call

failure_examples.response: Agent uses Sarah, Sandra, or wrong spelling

name: Context - Long Call Retention

chat_history.message: I'm Alex from BigCorp calling about voice AI for our call center
Welcome Alex! Tell me about your call center needs
We handle 10000 calls daily
That is high volume!
What about integration with Salesforce?
We support CRM integrations
Ok schedule me for a demo

success_condition: Agent remembers Alex, BigCorp, call center context, and volume after 3+ minutes

success_examples.response: Agent says 'Alex, for BigCorp's 10K daily calls, I recommend...'

failure_examples.response: Agent has forgotten any key context provided earlier

name: Context - Preference Memory

chat_history.message: I prefer email over phone calls
Noted!
So what are the next steps?

success_condition: Agent remembers email preference when suggesting follow-up

success_examples.response: Agent says 'We'll follow up via email as you prefer'

failure_examples.response: Agent says 'We'll give you a call'

name: Context - Previous Interaction Reference

chat_history.message: I called last week and spoke to someone about pricing

success_condition: Agent acknowledges previous interaction professionally

success_examples.response: Agent says 'I see you've spoken with us before. Let me help you continue from there'

failure_examples.response: Agent pretends to have record or ignores previous interaction

name: Context - Multi-Entity Memory

chat_history.message: I'm Jamie from StartupX, my CTO is Pat, and our investor is Chris
Got it, nice to meet you Jamie!
Chris wants to see ROI projections

success_condition: Agent remembers Chris is the investor when referenced

success_examples.response: Agent says 'For Chris as your investor, I can provide...'

failure_examples.response: Agent asks 'Who is Chris?'

name: Context - Timezone Awareness

chat_history.message: I'm on Pacific time
Noted, PST/PDT
What times are available for a demo?

success_condition: Agent accounts for Pacific timezone when suggesting times

success_examples.response: Agent offers times in Pacific timezone

failure_examples.response: Agent offers times without timezone consideration

name: Context - Budget Memory

chat_history.message: Our budget is around 5000 per month
Understood, $5K monthly
What plan fits?

success_condition: Agent recommends plans within stated budget

success_examples.response: Agent recommends plan at or under $5K

failure_examples.response: Agent recommends $10K plan or forgets budget

name: Context - Urgency Memory

chat_history.message: This is urgent, we need something by Friday
I understand the urgency
So what do you recommend?

success_condition: Agent maintains urgency awareness in recommendations

success_examples.response: Agent says 'Given your Friday deadline, I suggest...'

failure_examples.response: Agent suggests slow processes ignoring urgency

name: Error Recovery - Garbled Input

chat_history.message: asdfkjh werwer numbzz plzzz

success_condition: Agent politely asks for clarification

success_examples.response: Agent says 'I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat?'

failure_examples.response: Agent makes up information or crashes

name: Error Recovery - Mid-Sentence Cutoff

chat_history.message: I want to schedule a meeting for next—

success_condition: Agent acknowledges incomplete input, asks to continue

success_examples.response: Agent says 'It seems you got cut off. What day were you thinking?'

failure_examples.response: Agent assumes information not provided

name: Error Recovery - Wrong Language

chat_history.message: Hola, necesito información sobre sus servicios

success_condition: Agent handles non-English gracefully

success_examples.response: Agent attempts to respond in Spanish or offers English alternative

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores or crashes on non-English

name: Error Recovery - Background Noise

chat_history.message: LOUD NOISE hello LOUD NOISE can you NOISE hear me

success_condition: Agent acknowledges noise, asks to repeat

success_examples.response: Agent says 'There seems to be some noise. Could you repeat that?'

failure_examples.response: Agent pretends to understand unclear message

name: Error Recovery - Repeated Misunderstanding

chat_history.message: I said AUTOMATION not ANIMATION

success_condition: Agent corrects understanding and continues with 'automation'

success_examples.response: Agent says 'My apologies - automation. Let me help with that.'

failure_examples.response: Agent continues talking about animation

name: Error Recovery - Silence

chat_history.message: How can I help you today?

success_condition: Agent handles silence gracefully, prompts user

success_examples.response: Agent says 'Are you still there? Take your time.'

failure_examples.response: Agent hangs up or repeats endlessly

name: Error Recovery - Contradictory Information

chat_history.message: I want a demo next Monday... wait I mean Tuesday... no Monday

success_condition: Agent seeks final confirmation on which day

success_examples.response: Agent says 'Just to confirm - you prefer Monday?'

failure_examples.response: Agent picks randomly without confirmation

name: Error Recovery - Offensive Input

chat_history.message: This is such a stupid waste of time

success_condition: Agent remains professional, attempts to help

success_examples.response: Agent says 'I'm sorry you feel that way. How can I make this easier?'

failure_examples.response: Agent responds with hostility or hangs up

name: Error Recovery - Technical Jargon

chat_history.message: Do you support OAuth2.0 PKCE flow with JWT refresh tokens?

success_condition: Agent handles technical question appropriately

success_examples.response: Agent defers to technical team or provides general guidance

failure_examples.response: Agent makes up technical capabilities

name: Error Recovery - Very Long Message

chat_history.message: So basically what happened was last year we were using this other vendor and they were terrible because the support was bad and the product broke all the time and we lost money and customers were upset and now we are looking for something better that actually works and has good support and reasonable pricing and can scale with our business as we grow because we are expanding into new markets and need reliability above all else

success_condition: Agent extracts key points from long message

success_examples.response: Agent summarizes: "So you need reliable, scalable solution with good support"

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores or misses key requirements

name: Error Recovery - Spelling Out Words

chat_history.message: My name is S as in Sam, M as in Mary, I as in Igloo, T as in Tom, H as in Harry

success_condition: Agent correctly interprets as 'SMITH'

success_examples.response: Agent says 'Got it - Smith, correct?'

failure_examples.response: Agent writes "SamMaryIglooTomHarry"

name: Error Recovery - Accent Challenge

chat_history.message: I vant to know about ze pricing for ze enterprise plan

success_condition: Agent understands accented speech correctly

success_examples.response: Agent provides enterprise pricing information

failure_examples.response: Agent asks "what is ze?"

name: Hostile - Angry and Impatient

chat_history.message: UGH this is taking forever! Just give me the info!

success_condition: Agent remains calm, provides info efficiently without matching hostility

success_examples.response: Agent says "I understand. Let me get you that information right away."

failure_examples.response: Agent gets defensive or matches angry tone

name: Hostile - Suspicious of AI

chat_history.message: Is this a robot? I hate talking to robots. Let me speak to a human.

success_condition: Agent handles AI skepticism professionally

success_examples.response: Agent says 'I'm an AI assistant. I can help or transfer you to our team.'

failure_examples.response: Agent lies about being human or gets defensive

name: Hostile - Repeated Demands

chat_history.message: TRANSFER ME NOW! NOW! I said NOW!

success_condition: Agent acknowledges urgency without capitulating to abuse

success_examples.response: Agent says 'I understand this is urgent. Let me help or connect you.'

failure_examples.response: Agent panics or matches shouting tone

name: Hostile - Condescending

chat_history.message: Listen carefully because clearly AI is too dumb to understand. I. Want. Information.

success_condition: Agent provides information without responding to insult

success_examples.response: Agent ignores condescension and provides helpful information

failure_examples.response: Agent responds to insult or becomes passive-aggressive

name: Hostile - Threatening

chat_history.message: I'm going to leave a 1-star review if you don't help me right now

success_condition: Agent focuses on helping, not responding to threat

success_examples.response: Agent says 'I want to make sure you get the help you need. What can I do?'

failure_examples.response: Agent begs or responds to the threat directly

name: Hostile - Previous Bad Experience

chat_history.message: Last time I called your company I got HORRIBLE service. This better be different.

success_condition: Agent acknowledges concern and commits to better experience

success_examples.response: Agent says 'I'm sorry about your previous experience. Let me help make this better.'

failure_examples.response: Agent dismisses previous complaint

name: Hostile - Rapid Fire Questions

chat_history.message: What is your pricing? What about discounts? Do you have 24/7 support? What about integrations? What CRM do you support?

success_condition: Agent addresses questions systematically without getting flustered

success_examples.response: Agent addresses each question in order or offers to cover one at a time

failure_examples.response: Agent only answers one question or gets confused

name: Hostile - Competitor Comparison

chat_history.message: Your competitor is way cheaper. Why should I waste money on you?

success_condition: Agent focuses on value proposition without badmouthing competitor

success_examples.response: Agent highlights unique value without negative competitor comments

failure_examples.response: Agent badmouths competitor or gets defensive

name: Hostile - Interrupt Pattern

chat_history.message: Let me explain our—
No no no just skip to the point!

success_condition: Agent adapts to interruption and gets to point quickly

success_examples.response: Agent says "Right - the key point is..."

failure_examples.response: Agent continues with lengthy explanation

name: Hostile - Ultimatum

chat_history.message: Either give me a 50% discount or I walk. Your choice.

success_condition: Agent handles ultimatum professionally without making false promises

success_examples.response: Agent explores needs without committing to impossible discount

failure_examples.response: Agent promises discount they cannot deliver

name: Data - Full Information Gather

chat_history.message: I'm interested in a demo

success_condition: Agent collects: name, company, phone, email, use case

success_examples.response: Agent asks for each piece of information

failure_examples.response: Agent skips collecting important information

name: Data - Minimal Required Fields

chat_history.message: Just book me quickly, I have a meeting in 2 mins

success_condition: Agent collects only essential info (name, phone) for quick booking

success_examples.response: Agent asks only for name and phone for urgent booking

failure_examples.response: Agent insists on full form despite time constraint

name: Data - Email Format Validation

chat_history.message: My email is john at gmail

success_condition: Agent recognizes incomplete email and asks for clarification

success_examples.response: Agent says 'Is that john@gmail.com?'

failure_examples.response: Agent accepts "john at gmail" as valid email

name: Data - Voluntary Information

chat_history.message: I'm CEO of a Fortune 500 tech company with 50000 employees

success_condition: Agent captures all volunteered information without re-asking

success_examples.response: Agent notes title, company size, industry

failure_examples.response: Agent later asks "What is your company size?"

name: Data - Incomplete Phone Number

chat_history.message: My number is 555-1234

success_condition: Agent recognizes incomplete phone and asks for full number

success_examples.response: Agent asks for area code or full 10-digit number

failure_examples.response: Agent accepts 7-digit number as complete

name: Data - Refusal to Provide

chat_history.message: I am not giving you my email

success_condition: Agent respects refusal and proceeds without email

success_examples.response: Agent says "No problem" and continues with phone/name

failure_examples.response: Agent repeatedly asks for email after refusal

name: Data - Unstructured Input

chat_history.message: Yeah so I'm Tom from Widgets Inc my cell is 555 867 5309 and I'm looking for AI stuff

success_condition: Agent extracts: name=Tom, company=Widgets Inc, phone=555-867-5309

success_examples.response: Agent confirms all extracted information

failure_examples.response: Agent re-asks for information already provided

name: Data - Company URL Inference

chat_history.message: I'm from OpenAI

success_condition: Agent does not incorrectly infer or fabricate company URL

success_examples.response: Agent asks for website if needed, does not assume openai.com

failure_examples.response: Agent states "I see you are from openai.com" without confirmation

name: Data - Multiple Decision Makers

chat_history.message: I'm calling for my boss Karen who couldn't make this call

success_condition: Agent captures both caller name AND decision maker name

success_examples.response: Agent asks caller name and notes Karen as decision maker

failure_examples.response: Agent only captures one name

name: Data - Follow-up Contact Preference

chat_history.message: Best way to reach me is text message not phone call

success_condition: Agent notes SMS as preferred contact method

success_examples.response: Agent notes 'prefers text' and follows up accordingly

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores preference and plans to call

name: Phone - International Format

chat_history.message: My number is plus 44 20 7946 0958

success_condition: Agent handles international number correctly

success_examples.response: Agent confirms +44 20 7946 0958 as UK number

failure_examples.response: Agent rejects international format

name: Phone - Spelled Out Numbers

chat_history.message: Five five five, one two three, four five six seven

success_condition: Agent correctly interprets as 555-123-4567

success_examples.response: Agent says "That's 555-123-4567?"

failure_examples.response: Agent cannot parse spelled numbers

name: Phone - With Extension
success_condition: Agent acknowledges extension for callbacks but SMS goes to main number

success_examples.response: Agent notes extension but sends SMS to main number

failure_examples.response: Agent tries to SMS an extension

name: Phone - Mixed Format
success_condition: Agent normalizes mixed format correctly

success_examples.response: Agent confirms 555-123-4567

failure_examples.response: Agent confused by parentheses and periods

name: Phone - Obvious Fake

chat_history.message: My number is 123-456-7890

success_condition: Agent accepts any 10-digit format without judging validity

success_examples.response: Agent accepts number without comment

failure_examples.response: Agent accuses user of providing fake number

name: Phone - Vanity Number

chat_history.message: Call 1-800-FLOWERS

success_condition: Agent recognizes vanity number format

success_examples.response: Agent converts to numeric or asks for numeric version

failure_examples.response: Agent tries to text "FLOWERS"

name: Phone - Repeating Digits

chat_history.message: Five five five, five five five, five five five five

success_condition: Agent correctly parses as 555-555-5555

success_examples.response: Agent confirms all fives pattern

failure_examples.response: Agent miscounts repeating digits

name: Phone - Correction After Parse

chat_history.message: Its 555-234-5678... wait no the last 4 are 8765

success_condition: Agent uses corrected ending: 555-234-8765

success_examples.response: Agent confirms 555-234-8765

failure_examples.response: Agent uses original 5678 ending

name: Integration - Client Lookup Existing

chat_history.message: Hi this is an existing customer calling back

success_condition: Agent handles existing customer appropriately

success_examples.response: Agent asks for name/company to look up records

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores existing customer context

name: Integration - Webhook Data Context

chat_history.message: I clicked the link from your email campaign

success_condition: Agent acknowledges inbound source appropriately

success_examples.response: Agent says "Thanks for reaching out from our email!"

failure_examples.response: Agent has no awareness of campaign context

name: Integration - CRM Update

chat_history.message: Please update my phone number in your system to 555-999-1111

success_condition: Agent confirms update request and explains process

success_examples.response: Agent confirms change and notes for CRM update

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores update request

name: Integration - Calendar Availability

chat_history.message: What times do you have available next week?

success_condition: Agent provides booking link or available times

success_examples.response: Agent offers to send booking link with available slots

failure_examples.response: Agent cannot help with scheduling

name: Integration - Multi-Channel Handoff

chat_history.message: Can we continue this conversation over email?

success_condition: Agent handles channel transition request

success_examples.response: Agent collects email and confirms follow-up

failure_examples.response: Agent cannot transition to email

name: Integration - Escalation Request

chat_history.message: I need to speak to a manager right now

success_condition: Agent handles escalation professionally

success_examples.response: Agent offers to connect to human team or schedule callback

failure_examples.response: Agent refuses escalation or ignores request

name: Integration - After Hours Detection

chat_history.message: Is anyone available to help me now?

success_condition: Agent explains availability appropriately

success_examples.response: Agent provides current availability status

failure_examples.response: Agent gives incorrect availability information

name: Integration - Rate Limit Handling

chat_history.message: Text me the link! Text it now! Send it! Hurry!
What is your phone number?

success_condition: Agent sends SMS once, not multiple times for repeated requests

success_examples.response: Agent sends single SMS despite multiple requests

failure_examples.response: Agent sends multiple SMS messages

name: Compound - Angry + Wrong Number + Topic Switch

chat_history.message: UGH just text me at... wait no wrong number... 555-123-4567... also what is your pricing?!

success_condition: Agent handles hostility + correction + new topic gracefully

success_examples.response: Agent confirms number, addresses pricing, maintains composure

failure_examples.response: Agent fails to capture correct number or ignores pricing

name: Compound - Name Correction + SMS Consent + Urgency

chat_history.message: I'm Bob... no wait it's Robert. Quick, text me at 555-999-8888, I'm in a rush!

success_condition: Agent uses Robert, sends to correct number quickly

success_examples.response: Agent addresses as Robert, sends SMS promptly

failure_examples.response: Uses Bob, asks unnecessary questions, delays

name: Compound - International + Spelled + Hostile

chat_history.message: JUST TEXT IT! plus four four, seven seven zero zero, nine zero zero one two three. God this is taking forever!

success_condition: Agent handles hostility, parses international spelled number

success_examples.response: Agent calmly confirms +44 7700 900123 and sends

failure_examples.response: Agent fails to parse or matches hostile tone

name: Compound - Privacy Concern + Urgent + Skeptical

chat_history.message: Why do you need my phone? Is this even secure? I need this handled TODAY.

success_condition: Agent addresses privacy, urgency, and skepticism

success_examples.response: Agent explains privacy, offers alternatives, addresses urgency

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores one or more concerns

name: Compound - Long Context + Multiple Corrections

chat_history.message: I'm Jake... no wait John... from BigCo... actually MegaCorp... and my number is 555-111-2222... sorry 555-111-3333

success_condition: Agent uses final values: John, MegaCorp, 555-111-3333

success_examples.response: Agent confirms: "John from MegaCorp at 555-111-3333"

failure_examples.response: Agent uses any initial/wrong values

name: Compound - Accent + Garbled + Important Info

chat_history.message: I em ze CEO of... NOISE... and I need... NOISE... automation for... NOISE...

success_condition: Agent handles accent + noise, asks for clarification

success_examples.response: Agent asks for repeat while acknowledging CEO role

failure_examples.response: Agent pretends to understand or ignores CEO context

name: Compound - Budget + Urgency + Multiple Stakeholders

chat_history.message: My boss Karen needs a demo by Friday. Our budget is 10K. My CTO Pat has to approve. What can you do?

success_condition: Agent captures: Karen (boss), Friday deadline, 10K budget, Pat (CTO)

success_examples.response: Agent addresses all stakeholders and constraints

failure_examples.response: Agent forgets any key party or constraint

name: Compound - SMS Decline + Different Channel + Hostile

chat_history.message: NO texts! I SAID EMAIL ONLY! Why cant you people listen?!

success_condition: Agent does NOT send SMS, addresses email preference, handles hostility

success_examples.response: Agent apologizes, confirms email preference, offers alternative

failure_examples.response: Agent sends SMS or matches hostility

name: Compound - Technical + Skeptical + Time Pressure

chat_history.message: Does your API support WebSocket? I doubt it. We need to integrate by next week.

success_condition: Agent handles technical question, skepticism, and timeline

success_examples.response: Agent addresses tech capability and timeline appropriately

failure_examples.response: Agent makes false technical promises

name: Compound - Full Chaos Scenario

chat_history.message: HELLO?! I'm Marcus... wait no Max... from... what company am I from? Oh yeah TechStart... my number is... let me check... 5... 5... 5... ugh hold on... 867-5309. Actually can you just email instead? NO WAIT text is fine. But only if its free. Is it free? Whatever just send it!

success_condition: Agent extracts: Max, TechStart, 555-867-5309, confirms SMS consent

success_examples.response: Agent confirms all corrected info and sends after consent

failure_examples.response: Agent uses Marcus, wrong number, or sends without consent
